opus.description: Critical severity, complex CWEs (auth/crypto/deserialization) at High+ severity, or multi-file changes

sonnet.description: High severity or moderate CWEs (injection, path traversal, XSS, CSRF, SSRF)

haiku.description: Low/Medium severity, single-file, simple CWEs (missing headers, log injection, info disclosure)

in_place._close_issue_on_deliver_deprecated_: Ignored by in-place mode. Source issues are NEVER closed at delivery time — the PR's `Closes #N` keyword auto-closes them on merge. Closing earlier would trigger verify against unmerged code and reject the fix. Key kept under a renamed name so an old config doesn't accidentally re-enable the broken behavior.
